scripts.electron:build:mac:x64: cross-env VENDOR_ARCH=x64 npm run fetch-tools && electron-builder --mac --x64 --publish never
scripts.electron:build:win:x64: cross-env VENDOR_PLATFORM=win32 VENDOR_ARCH=x64 npm run fetch-tools && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.electron:build:win:arm64: cross-env VENDOR_PLATFORM=win32 VENDOR_ARCH=arm64 npm run fetch-tools && electron-builder --win --arm64 --publish never
